name: 寢宮（親密與危機並存）
description: 寢宮場景承載了巫蠱事件的高潮和帝后重修舊好的撒糖，是危機與情感的交匯點。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: Your Majesty, have you rested enough? Why don't we go for another round? The bed is about to collapse.
examples.context: 寢宮場景承載了巫蠱事件的高潮和帝后重修舊好的撒糖，是危機與情感的交匯點。
